title: Migrate Postgres from laura-db backup to which-is-shorter-db
description: Use LMfarm's backup system to pg_dump the existing laura-db, then restore into the new which-is-shorter-db. Verify Users, UserSettings, Trip, TripLeg tables come over intact. Run prisma migrate deploy after restore to confirm schema matches.
notes: Restored 2026-05-09. Snapshot fde5158f-28ab-4f1a-8ff4-b3e339950cc6 (laura-db) restored to which-is-shorter-db (3f495e72-...) at 2026-05-10T01:36:14Z. last_restore_status=completed, no error. snapshot size_bytes was null both sides post-fix; first completed snap (9ec54dbc) was 9875B. Authoritative verification still pending: log into https://which-is-shorter.45.59.71.47.nip.io with existing laura account and confirm trips/settings appear.

title: Deploy which-is-shorter service to LMfarm
description: Provision a new LMfarm service named which-is-shorter (don't rename existing 'laura' service — LMfarm services typically can't be renamed). Provision a paired which-is-shorter-db Postgres service. Capture: deployed URL, service name, db service name. Update reference_lmfarm.md memory once known.
notes: Deployed 2026-05-07. URL: https://which-is-shorter.45.59.71.47.nip.io. Service ID: 8cf1a232-ce45-46e7-b9e9-4b0247656964. DB service: which-is-shorter-db (3f495e72-8640-421b-9254-d15ad82d1e0f). Health 200 OK; init migration applied.

title: Update local .env.local with new URLs
description: Update NEXTAUTH_URL to the new which-is-shorter LMfarm URL and DATABASE_URL to the new which-is-shorter-db connection string. Keep GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY and NEXTAUTH_SECRET as-is.

title: Update Google Maps API key referrer restrictions
description: Add the new which-is-shorter LMfarm domain to the Google Maps API key's HTTP referrer allowlist. Keep the old laura domain until cutover is verified, then remove it.

title: Rename project directory from laura to which-is-shorter
description: Run mv ~/Code/projects/laura ~/Code/projects/which-is-shorter. Note: this orphans the auto-memory at ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dw-Code-projects-laura/. Update any local shortcuts/aliases pointing at the old path.
close_reason: Project directory renamed from /Users/dw/Code/projects/laura to /Users/dw/Code/projects/which-is-shorter. Memory directory at ~/.claude/projects/-Users-dw-Code-projects-laura intentionally left in place (will become orphaned but preserves history).

title: Clean up login redirect URL (drop callbackUrl)
description: When an unauthenticated user visits any protected route, Auth.js v5 redirects to /login?callbackUrl=<full-encoded-url>, which looks ugly in the address bar. The login page already hardcodes router.push('/') after success, so the callbackUrl is decorative. Replace the authorized callback's implicit false-return with an explicit Response.redirect to /login (no query string).
